surface_strategy.implementation: border-collapse style layout. 1px borders on right/bottom of grid items. Pure solid colors. No glassmorphism. Absolute minimal shadows.

animation.hover_states: Hard cuts or very fast transitions (0.15s ease-out). Hover backgrounds shift from #0A0A0A to #141414.
animation.interactions: No bouncy physics. Strictly linear/ease-out fades and slides.

iconography.style: Regular or Bold weight, highly legible at small sizes.

component_guidelines.app_shell: 3-column fluid grid. Left: Sidebar (narrow, icon only or icon+text). Middle: Chat List (fixed width). Right: Active Chat (fluid).
component_guidelines.avatars: Square with slight rounded corners (rounded-md). Unread status shown by a solid 2px border of primary_accent with ring-offset-black.
component_guidelines.chat_list_item: Hover shifts surface color. Title is white, subtitle/message preview is secondary gray. Unread count in a sharp square badge.
component_guidelines.chat_bubbles: Sender: bg-[#0066FF] text-white. Receiver: bg-[#141414] text-white border border-[#262626]. Both rounded-md.
component_guidelines.message_input: Bottom anchored block. No floating pill. Solid 1px top border. Input field takes full width, no background.
component_guidelines.stories_status: Horizontal scroll in a dedicated top section of the Chat List. Square avatars.
component_guidelines.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

login_background.description: Macro photography of a sleek, dark metallic grid for login page.

user_avatars.description: a person with a grey sweater
Young woman with short black hair

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Dark-First pure black (#000000) background. Do not revert to generic white screens.
Implement the 'Control Room Grid'. The app must feel like a dense, highly efficient dashboard.
Do not use Shadcn card rounded styles (no rounded-xl). Override to rounded-sm or rounded-none to maintain the brutalist feel.
Use Phosphor icons. Size them consistently.
Inject the media URLs exactly as provided. Never use placeholder services.
Ensure the UI layout extends 100% height (h-screen) with overflow managed inside the columns.
Use JetBrains Mono for all timestamps and unread counters.
File extensions are .js (e.g. JSX components are in .js files), avoid TypeScript specific setups.
